questions.stem:
-- I haven't seen Jack for a long time.
-- He _____ Beijing. He won't come back until next month.
questions.explanation: have been to 表示去过已回来；have gone to 表示去了还没回来。根据 won't come back until next month 可知他去了还没回来，选 has gone to。

options: A. if they have finished the work
B. if they had finished the work
C. have they finished the work
D. had they finished the work
questions.explanation: 宾语从句三要素：1) 引导词 if/whether（是否）；2) 陈述语序（排除C、D）；3) 时态呼应——主句 asked 是过去时，从句要用过去完成时 had finished。

questions.stem: The boy _____ is playing basketball over there is my cousin.
questions.explanation: 先行词 the boy 是人，且在从句中作主语，用关系代词 who。which 修饰物；whom 作宾语；what 不引导定语从句。

questions.stem: My mum always tells me _____ too much time on computer games.
questions.explanation: tell sb. (not) to do sth. 固定搭配，否定形式是 not to do，放在 to 前面。不是 to not do（D错）。

questions.stem: We felt very _____ (excite) when we heard the _____ (excite) news.
questions.explanation: -ed 形容词修饰人的感受（we felt excited）；-ing 形容词修饰事物的性质（exciting news）。

questions.stem: Please _____ the lights when you leave the classroom.
questions.explanation: 离开教室应该关灯。turn on 打开；turn off 关闭；turn up 调大音量；turn down 调小音量/拒绝。

questions.stem: Tom is very _____. He always shares his food and toys with others.
questions.explanation: 根据语境 shares his food and toys with others（与人分享食物和玩具）可知 Tom 很慰慨大方。generous = 慰慨的。

questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school held a music festival. Every class needed to (8)_____ a band and perform on stage. At first, nobody in our class wanted to be the lead singer. We all felt (9)_____ about singing in front of hundreds of people.

Then Amy raised her hand. We were (10)_____ because Amy was always quiet in class. She said, 'I know I'm not the best singer, but I'd like to try.' Her (11)_____ encouraged the rest of us. Soon, Jack offered to play guitar, and Lily said she could play drums.

We practiced every afternoon for two weeks. Sometimes we made mistakes and felt like (12)_____. But Amy always smiled and said, 'Let's try one more time.' On the day of the festival, we performed our best. We didn't win first prize, but everyone cheered for us. We learned that trying is more important than being perfect.
questions.explanation: form a band = 组建一个乐队。join 是加入已有的；leave 是离开；close 是关闭。根据语境每个班需要'组建'乐队表演。
根据 singing in front of hundreds of people（在几百人前面唱歌）且 nobody wanted to be the lead singer，说明大家感到紧张。nervous = 紧张的。
Amy was always quiet in class（Amy 平时很安静），但她主动举手，所以大家感到'惊讶'。surprised 符合'出乎意料'的语境。
Amy 主动站出来的'勇气'(courage)鼓励了其他人。后面写到 encouraged the rest of us，对应 courage。
felt like giving up = 想要放弃。前面说 made mistakes（犯了错误），自然会想放弃。But 转折后 Amy 鼓励大家再试一次，形成对比。

questions.group_passage:
Have you ever thought about growing food without soil? This is not science fiction -- it is called vertical farming, and it is already happening in many cities around the world.

Vertical farms are indoor farms built in tall buildings. Instead of soil, plants grow in water mixed with nutrients. Special LED lights provide the energy that plants need to grow. Because everything is controlled indoors, vertical farms can produce food all year round, no matter what the weather is like outside.

There are several advantages of vertical farming. First, it uses much less water than traditional farming -- about 95% less. Second, because the farms are in cities, food does not need to travel long distances to reach consumers. This means fresher food and less pollution from trucks. Third, no pesticides are needed because there are no insects indoors.

However, vertical farming also has challenges. The biggest one is the cost of electricity for the LED lights. Running these lights 24 hours a day is expensive. Some critics say that until we find cheaper and greener energy sources, vertical farming will not be able to compete with traditional farming on price.

Despite these challenges, many experts believe vertical farming will play an important role in feeding the growing world population, especially in crowded cities where farmland is scarce.
questions.stem: How much less water does vertical farming use compared to traditional farming?
questions.explanation: 原文第三段明确说 it uses much less water than traditional farming -- about 95% less，直接对应选项C。

questions.stem: What is the biggest challenge of vertical farming according to the passage?
options: A. There is not enough space in cities.
B. The cost of electricity for LED lights.
C. Plants cannot grow without soil.
D. Consumers do not trust indoor food.
questions.explanation: 原文第四段 The biggest one is the cost of electricity for the LED lights，直接点明最大挑战是LED灯的电费成本。

questions.stem: What does the underlined word 'scarce' in the last paragraph probably mean?
questions.explanation: scarce 出现在 crowded cities where farmland is scarce 的语境中。拥挤的城市里农田'稀缺/难以找到'，C. Difficult to find 最贴近。

questions.stem: What is the best title for the passage?
options: A. How to Save Water in Cities
B. The Future of Indoor Farming
C. Why Traditional Farming Is Better
D. The History of Growing Food
questions.explanation: 全文围绕垂直农业（室内农业）的概念、优势、挑战和未来展望展开，B. The Future of Indoor Farming 最能概括主旨。

questions.group_passage:
Last Friday, our school organized a charity run to raise money for a children's hospital. (17)_____ The PE teacher said everyone should warm up first to avoid getting hurt.

At 9 a.m., the race began. Some fast runners quickly ran ahead, but most of us just tried to finish the whole course. (18)_____ She always encouraged us to keep going.

(19)_____ Some students felt tired and wanted to stop, but when they thought about the sick children in the hospital, they found new energy to continue.

(20)_____ We raised over 5,000 yuan in total. Our headmaster said he was very proud of us.
options: A. In the end, everyone crossed the finish line.
B. More than 300 students took part in the event.
C. Our class teacher ran with us the whole time.
D. The course was three kilometres long.
E. The weather was too hot for outdoor activities.
questions.explanation: 第一段介绍活动背景，(17)后紧跟'体育老师说大家应该先热身'，说明前文在描述参与的人数规模，B'超过300名学生参加了活动'最合适。

options: A. In the end, everyone crossed the finish line.
B. More than 300 students took part in the event.
C. Our class teacher ran with us the whole time.
D. The course was three kilometres long.
E. The weather was too hot for outdoor activities.
questions.explanation: 后面说 She always encouraged us to keep going，代词 She 指代的必然是女性，且'和我们一起跑全程'才能鼓励我们，选C'班主任全程和我们一起跑'。

options: A. In the end, everyone crossed the finish line.
B. More than 300 students took part in the event.
C. Our class teacher ran with us the whole time.
D. The course was three kilometres long.
E. The weather was too hot for outdoor activities.
questions.explanation: 后面说'有些学生感到累想停下来'，前面应该交代赛程信息——'赛道有三公里长'，说明距离不短，所以有人累了。选D。

options: A. In the end, everyone crossed the finish line.
B. More than 300 students took part in the event.
C. Our class teacher ran with us the whole time.
D. The course was three kilometres long.
E. The weather was too hot for outdoor activities.
questions.explanation: 最后一段总结结果，(20)后面说'我们总共筹集了5000多元'，前面应该是'最终所有人都冲过了终点线'，表示大家都坚持完成了。A 是总结性句子，位于结尾段合适。干扰项E与文章积极主题不符。
